description: Navigate to the London Array offshore wind farm in the Thames Estuary (~51.5°N, 1.4°E). Create placemarks named 'Turbine 1', 'Turbine 2', and 'Turbine 3' on three consecutive turbines in a row, and measure the spacing between Turbine 1 and Turbine 2. Save a screenshot showing the placemarks and measurement to /home/ga/wind_farm_analysis.png.

metadata.target_location: London Array Wind Farm, Thames Estuary, UK
metadata.data_source: Real operational offshore wind farm - public satellite imagery
